simple_types.name: Atomic_Type
simple_types.code: type Atomic_Type is new Atomic_Base_Type with Atomic;

documentation.description: Update Max to the Atomic_Type'Max of Max'Old and New_Val.

subprograms.name: Update_Max
subprograms.code:
function Update_Max
  (Max : aliased in out Atomic_Type; New_Val : Atomic_Type)
  return Atomic_Type

documentation.description:
Update Max to the Atomic_Type'Max of Max'Old and New_Val,
and return prior value of Max.

subprograms.name: Update_Max
subprograms.code:
procedure Update_Max
  (Max : aliased in out Atomic_Type; New_Val : Atomic_Type)

documentation.description: Update Max to the Atomic_Type'Max of Max'Old and New_Val.

subprograms.name: Update_Min
subprograms.code:
function Update_Min
  (Min : aliased in out Atomic_Type; New_Val : Atomic_Type)
  return Atomic_Type

documentation.description:
Update Min to the Atomic_Type'Min of Min'Old and New_Val,
and return prior value of Min.

subprograms.name: Update_Min
subprograms.code:
procedure Update_Min
  (Min : aliased in out Atomic_Type; New_Val : Atomic_Type)

documentation.description: Update Min to the Atomic_Type'Min of Min'Old and New_Val.
